# CANDIDATE: ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER_REAL_FILLS_VALIDATION

**Filed:** 2026-05-21  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** quality_gate  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

We aim to validate the real-fills performance of ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER (long-only) using ATM call entries at bar close with -8% premium stop and TP1=+75% to determine if the watcher-graded WR=70.4% holds under realistic OPRA fill assumptions. Per L50, SPY-price proxy cannot model the initial bounce on ATM options after ORB breakout, necessitating real-fills validation.

## Mechanism

For each of the 274 ORB long-only observations from `orb_watcher.py`:
- Entry: ATM call (strike = round(SPY_close/0.5)*0.5) at the bar close of the ORB breakout bar
- Stop: -8% of entry premium (trailing stop not applied)
- Target: TP1 = +75% of entry premium (exit 100% of position at target)
- Exit: First of stop or target hit during RTH (09:30-16:00 ET)
- Record win if TP1 hit, loss if stop hit
- Use `simulator_real.py` with OPRA cache for realistic bid/ask/slippage

Invocation:  
`python simulator_real.py --strategy orb_direction_filter --entry atm_call_close --stop_pct -0.08 --tp1_pct 0.75 --observations 274 --output real_fills_orblong.csv`

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+ account; $1K paper account realizes ~14% of headline P&L due to 50% per-trade risk cap
2. **Sample bias:** 274 ORB long-only observations from watcher (Jan 2025-May 2026); selection based on ORB breakout direction filter; overfit risk mitigated by walk-forward pass (IS Sharpe=2.726 vs OOS Sharpe=7.950)
3. **Out-of-sample:** OOS Sharpe=7.950 (test 2025-10-01..2026-05-15, N=163) from existing ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER walk-forward
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (specific configuration: ATM call entry at bar close, -8% premium stop, TP1=+75pct not yet tested via simulator_real.py)
5. **Failure modes:** 
   - Worst day: -$260 (5/05 loser day if engine takes losing trade)
   - Max drawdown: -$766 (2025-Q1 concentrated loss)
   - Blow-up scenario: Extended choppy regime (2025-Q1/Q4) causing consecutive -8% stops on whipsaws
6. **Concentration:** 2026-Q2 alone = 85% of total long-ORB P&L ($6,245 of $7,378); top-5 days = ~62% of P&L (requires verification)

## Pre-merge gate

- simulator_real.py must pass validation on top 3 J days (4/29, 5/01, 5/04) with diff < ±20% vs BS-sim
- Walk-forward OOS Sharpe must remain >=0.50x IS Sharpe
- Real-fills WR must be >=50% to avoid REJECTION per OP-16 edge_capture floor

## Confidence

3 / 10 -- No real-fills data yet for requested configuration; watcher-graded WR=70.4% likely overstates real-fills performance per L50/L51/L55 analogs showing premium stops fire prematurely on ORB retracements

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Complements ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER (#5) by validating its real-fills viability; does not conflict with other candidates. If real-fills WR >=50%, supports promotion to PROMISING; if <50%, triggers REJECTION regardless of watcher grades.
